data.name: LblPowerMode.ToolTip
data.value: M3 Constant Laser Power Mode M4 Dynamic Laser Power Mode

data.name: BtnUseZ.ToolTip
data.value: Use Z axis for deeper cuts

data.name: LblPowerMin.ToolTip
data.value: S-Value; minimum value if variable power is calculated

data.name: LblZInfo.Text
data.value: The number of passes determines the z step size to reach final z position. Passes=1 -> Z[1]=0 Passes=2 -> Z[1]=0; Z[2]=Final-Z Passes=n -> Z[1]=0; Z[x]=x*Final-Z/n, Z[n]=Final-Z

data.name: LblOverlapInfo.Text
data.value: Extends the laser’s path slightly beyond the actual endpoint of a closed shape during cutting. This ensures the material is completely severed. Aditionally objects will be sort by size, largest comes last.

data.name: CbLaserpower.ToolTip
data.value: grbl $32 setting M3 Constant Laser Power Mode: Constant laser power mode simply keeps the laser power as programmed, regardless if the machine is moving, M4 Dynamic Laser Power Mode: Dynamic laser power mode will automatically adjust laser power based on the current speed relative to the programmed rate.
